REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JOHNNY HANSELL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF SHALL ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF NON-SPECULATIVE DAMAGES AS TO EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL ALSO ALLEGE FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) TO SUPPORT EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL ONLY MAKE AMENDMENTS IN GOOD FAITH AND IN LIGHT OF AUTHORITIES CITED BY DEFENDANT. ALL AMENDMENTS TO BE IN BOLD FONT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO DISMISS FRAUD/CONSPIRACY ALLEGATIONS. PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO ASSERT INJUNCTIVE RELIEF UNDER 17.200. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Aleksandr Volov, 415.987.7000 for Plaintiff/Opposing party.
Eric Lightman, 415.295.4777 for Defendant/Moving party.
Reported: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR 5229, 415.828.1919. p2gmoto@earthlink.net.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOHNNY HANSELL DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges each element of each cause of action. Whether Plaintiff will be able to prove damages, retention of benefit, etc., is a factual issue that will be addressed at a later point.
Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR 5229, 415.828.1919. p2gmoto@earthlink.net. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT NATANYA MONTGOMERY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Denise Leadbetter, esq. (415-713-8680) for Plaintiff/opposing party Joel Drouet.
Eric Lightman, esq. (415-495-4777) for Defendant/Moving party JOHNNY HANSELL.

ARGUED: dismiss fraud/conspiracy, 17.200, sublease at a profit, restitution, and amending complaint accordingly. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts/modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHNNY HANSELL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall allege facts in support of non-speculative damages as to each cause of action. Plaintiff shall also allege facts (not conclusions) to support each element of each cause of action. Plaintiff shall only make amendments in good faith and in light of authorities cited by defendant. All amendments to be in bold font. Plaintiff stipulates to dismiss fraud/conspiracy allegations. Plaintiff entitled to assert injunctive relief under 17.200. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHNNY HANSELL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF SMARTAIC'S CORPORATION.

The demurrer will be heard in department 501, the real property/housing court at 9:30am on July 27, 2018. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Defendant'S Demurrer
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Johnny Hansell'S Demurrer is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1010.6 and CCP 1013. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
